languages.text: {n}Спустя полминуты яростных логических столкновений вы одерживаете победу — каждый ход Экзальта-117 прокручивается в вашей голове словно пикт-запись. Пораженный выдох побежденного в собственной же игре магоса повисает в воздухе немым вопросом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Спустя полминуты яростных логических столкновений вы одерживаете победу — каждый ход Экзальта-117 прокручивается в вашей голове словно пикт-запись. Пораженный выдох побежденного в собственной же игре магоса повисает в воздухе немым вопросом.{/n}

languages.text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя полминуты яростных логических столкновений вы одерживаете победу — каждый ход Экзальта-117 прокручивается в вашей голове словно пикт-запись. Пораженный выдох побежденного в собственной же игре магоса повисает в воздухе немым вопросом.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}After half a minute of furious logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

{n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

languages.text: {n}经过半分钟激烈的逻辑对弈，你赢了。尊使-117的每一步都像视讯记录一样在你脑海中回放。贤者在自己设计的游戏里败下阵来，他那声因惊愕而导致的吸气声，凝滞在空气中，仿佛一个得不到解答的问题。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}经过半分钟激烈的逻辑对弈，你赢了。尊使-117的每一步都像视讯记录一样在你脑海中回放。贤者在自己设计的游戏里败下阵来，他那声因惊愕而导致的吸气声，凝滞在空气中，仿佛一个得不到解答的问题。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tous les coups d'Exalt-117 vous reviennent à l'esprit comme une pictocapture et, au bout de trente secondes d'affrontements logiques acharnés, vous remportez la victoire. Vaincu à son propre jeu, le magos laisse échapper un hoquet de surprise qui sonne comme une interrogation.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tous les coups d'Exalt-117 vous reviennent à l'esprit comme une pictocapture et, au bout de trente secondes d'affrontements logiques acharnés, vous remportez la victoire. Vaincu à son propre jeu, le magos laisse échapper un hoquet de surprise qui sonne comme une interrogation.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hiddetli mantıksal çatışmalarla geçen yarım dakikanın ardından oyunu kazanıyorsun. Yüce-117'nin her hamlesi, foto kaydı gibi kafanın içinde tekrar tekrar oynuyor. Magos'un kendi oyununda yenildiği anda istemsiz çıkan şaşkın nefesi, havada soru misali asılı kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Hiddetli mantıksal çatışmalarla geçen yarım dakikanın ardından oyunu kazanıyorsun. Yüce-117'nin her hamlesi, foto kaydı gibi kafanın içinde tekrar tekrar oynuyor. Magos'un kendi oyununda yenildiği anda istemsiz çıkan şaşkın nefesi, havada soru misali asılı kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tras medio minuto de intensos enfrentamientos lógicos, ganas: todos los movimientos de Exaltado-117 se reproducen en tu cabeza como un programa de imágenes grabadas. El grito ahogado que marca la derrota del magos atónito en su propio juego cae sobre la sala como una pregunta.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tras medio minuto de intensos enfrentamientos lógicos, ganas: todos los movimientos de Exaltado-117 se reproducen en tu cabeza como un programa de imágenes grabadas. El grito ahogado que marca la derrota del magos atónito en su propio juego cae sobre la sala como una pregunta.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nach einem 30 Sekunden währenden logischen Feuerwerk gewinnst du — jeder Zug von Exalt-117 läuft in deinem Kopf wie eine Vid-Aufzeichnung. Das verblüffte Keuchen des Magos angesichts seiner Niederlage in seinem eigenen Spiel hängt wie eine Frage in der Luft.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach einem 30 Sekunden währenden logischen Feuerwerk gewinnst du — jeder Zug von Exalt-117 läuft in deinem Kopf wie eine Vid-Aufzeichnung. Das verblüffte Keuchen des Magos angesichts seiner Niederlage in seinem eigenen Spiel hängt wie eine Frage in der Luft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}激しい論理の衝突が半分続いた後、あなたは勝利した。エクサルト117のあらゆる動きが頭の中で映像のように再生される。自分のゲームで敗れたマゴスの驚愕の息吹が、疑問のように空中に残る。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After half a minute of heated logical clashes, you win — every move of Exalt-117 plays in your head like a pict-recording. The Magos's stunned gasp as he is defeated at his own game hangs in the air like a question.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}激しい論理の衝突が半分続いた後、あなたは勝利した。エクサルト117のあらゆる動きが頭の中で映像のように再生される。自分のゲームで敗れたマゴスの驚愕の息吹が、疑問のように空中に残る。{/n}
